svg.title: Audio Transformer Block Diagram for Acoustic Scene Understanding
svg.desc: Animated left-to-right block diagram: raw waveform, patch extraction, learned filterbank front-end, positional encoding, six-layer transformer encoder, average pooling, and 200-class softmax classifier.
svg.text: Left-to-right data flow for acoustic scene understanding, publication-style animated SVG

g.text: Sinusoidal positional signal merged with patch embeddings
